title: Hormozi - Industry-Specific Template
transcript: If you want a [INDUSTRY] doing over a million dollars a year and you want to scale, I have a free gift for you. And so my team spent 200 plus hours reviewing portfolio companies and companies we advised to figure out exactly where people got stuck at each revenue level and looked at it across function. So that means marketing, sales, CS, finance, legal, tech, ops, the whole gamut, and more importantly, not where they get stuck, but how to get unstuck at each revenue level. It's a gift, it's absolutely free. If you want that, it'll give you a customized scaling roadmap to where you're at right now and what specific actions to take. The whole thing's a gift. No strings attached. So if you want it, click, put your information in, and it'll send it to you all personalized. And uh yeah, it rocks. And so you should use it. That's all I got. All right, grab it and uh have a good year.

hook.text: If you want a [INDUSTRY] doing over a million dollars a year and you want to scale, I have a free gift for you.

sections.name: Hook - Industry callout + qualifier
sections.summary: Filtra por industria Y por revenue ($1M+). Solo habla con los correctos.

key_phrases: I have a free gift for you

analysis.emotional_arc: Identificación (¡habla de MI industria!) → credibilidad → regalo sin fricción
strengths: Hyper-targeting por industria hace que el viewer sienta que es para él específicamente
Mismo body reutilizado para 15+ industrias = escala masiva con mínimo esfuerzo
El qualifier '$1M+' filtra y halaga a la vez
patterns_to_replicate: PATRÓN TEMPLATE INDUSTRIA: crear UN guion base y cambiar solo el hook con la industria específica. Usado en: peptide therapy, hormone therapy, HVAC, landscaping, garage door/fencing, aesthetics, clothing/apparel, remodeling, weight loss, holistic health, dental, consumer package goods, warehouse/logistics
Qualifier de revenue en el hook ('doing over a million') como filtro + halago
Escala de contenido: 1 template = 15+ ads distintos cambiando una palabra
